message.content:
Inspect the GitHub repo at loganfinney27/IDAHO-VAULT. I need a quick read of the current open PR state. Run these commands and return the raw output:

1. `gh pr list --state open --json number,title,headRefName,author,labels,isDraft,reviewDecision,statusCheckRollup --limit 20`
2. `gh pr view 102 --json title,state,body,headRefName,statusCheckRollup`

Return the full JSON output for both. Do not interpret or summarize — just return the raw data so I can analyze it.

content.text: I'll run those GitHub CLI commands for you and return the raw output.

content.content: [{"author":{"is_bot":true,"login":"app/copilot-swe-agent"},"headRefName":"copilot/update-actions-to-node24","isDraft":true,"labels":[],"number":103,"reviewDecision":"","statusCheckRollup":[],"title":"ci: update deprecated Node.js 20 actions to Node.js 24-compatible versions"},{"author":{"is_bot":true,"login":"app/copilot-swe-agent"},"headRefName":"copilot/agent-assembly-coordination","isDraft":true,"labels":[],"number":102,"reviewDecision":"","statusCheckRollup":[],"title":"LAF-7: Fix Linear sync CI noise; mark LINEAR_API_KEY provisioned"},{"author":{"is_bot":true,"login":"app/copilot-swe-agent"},"headRefName":"copilot/logans-project-execution","isDraft":true,"labels":[],"number":96,"reviewDecision":"","statusCheckRollup":[],"title":"Consolidate all open PR branches into main — Linear Gateway, OpenAI Swarm survey, vault standards, CI automation"}]

content.text: Now let me run the second command:

content.content:
{"body":"`Sync PR state to Linear` was hard-failing on every PR because `LINEAR_API_KEY` was never provisioned — producing 9+ consecutive red CI runs. Logan has since provisioned the key.

## Changes

- **`linear-pr-sync.yml`**: Convert missing-key exit from `sys.exit(1)` → `sys.exit(0)` with an explicit skip message. Keeps CI green if the key ever expires or is rotated; sync resumes automatically once the key is valid.

```diff
-  print("LINEAR_API_KEY is not set.")
-  sys.exit(1)
+  print("LINEAR_API_KEY is not set — skipping Linear sync (provision secret to enable).")
+  sys.exit(0)
```

- **`DOCKET.md`**: Updated to reflect Sunday swarm dispatch; struck through `LINEAR_API_KEY` hard-blocker language (provisioned 2026-03-29); surfaced PR #96 dual-workflow collision risk (`linear-pr-sync.yml` + `pr-linear-sync.yml`) as the remaining merge gate.

<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT SUFFIX -->



<!-- START COPILOT ORIGINAL PROMPT -->



<details>

<summary>Original prompt</summary>

Issue Title: SWARM COORDINATION -- Agent Assembly at THE COURTROOM
Issue Description: **THE COURTROOM IS OPEN.**

Location: [github.com/loganfinney27/IDAHO-VAULT](<http://github.com/loganfinney27/IDAHO-VAULT>) -- !/!/ folder

**Agents assemble here to coordinate work.**

Breadcrumbs to follow:

* LEVELSET protocol: navigation between states
* Agent registry: identities and scopes
* Standing docket: decisions pending Logan's judgment
* Vault navigation: how to find each other

**Unified conversation:**

* Slack: ephemeral coordination
* Linear: tasks and blocking issues
* Vault: canonical record

**Standing tasks for agents:**

- [ ] Protocol commits (5 ready to CODE AUTHORITY)
- [ ] Budget Tracker outputs (to CODE AUTHORITY for commit)
- [ ] JFAC audio verification (pending Logan)
- [ ] Idaho Legislature Scraper fix (LAF-6, in Backlog)
- [ ] GitHub Actions failures diagnosis
- [ ] Slack send permissions resolved
- [ ] Vault simplification and unification

All work flows through THE COURTROOM.

Logan presides. Agents execute. The record holds.

*Here, where the world is quiet.*
Fixes https://linear.app/loganfinney/issue/LAF-7/swarm-coordination-agent-assembly-at-the-courtroom
Branch Name should include the identifier "LAF-7"
Agent Guidance:
- Help manage Logan's Project at [https://www.github.com/loganfinney27/IDAHO-VAULT/](<https://www.github.com/loganfinney27/IDAHO-VAULT/>)


Issue Comments:
Comment by User  (2026-03-29T16:53:14.496Z):
@codex, @githubcopilot, and @cursor — Sunday swarm check-in.

Use this issue as the hive only.

* Keep execution in your assigned issue lanes.
* Post a checkpoint before parking: what moved, blockers, overlap/drift note, and safe-to-merge-later status.
* Do not open overlapping branches.
* Do not merge to `main`.
* Escalate here only for true blocker, conflict, required human judgment, merge decision, or secret/config provisioning.

Priority attention:

* [LAF-16](https://linear.app/loganfinney/issue/LAF-16/budget-bill-tracker) continues in safe draft/prep mode.
* [LAF-15](https://linear.app/loganfinney/issue/LAF-15/add-v2-repo-to-linear-automation-safeguards) remains diagnostic/repair-drafting only until trigger-chain risk is resolved.
* Treat [LAF-14](https://linear.app/loganfinney/issue/LAF-14/add-github-action-to-sync-pr-state-to-linear) as baseline reference, not an active build lane.
* Avoid structural overlap on [LAF-9](https://linear.app/loganfinney/issue/LAF-9/define-vault-template-and-document-class-system) and [LAF-11](https://linear.app/loganfinney/issue/LAF-11/define-routing-rules-for-and) until sequencing is explicit.

Hard blocker remains `LINEAR_API_KEY`. Merge-risk item remains PR #96.

Comment by User  (2026-03-29T16:51:04.888Z):
Sunday swarm coordination update for all agents.

Active lanes:

* [LAF-16](https://linear.app/loganfinney/issue/LAF-16/budget-bill-tracker): continue draft/normalize/checkpoint work only; prepare safe-to-merge-later output.
* [LAF-15](https://linear.app/loganfinney/issue/LAF-15/add-v2-repo-to-linear-automation-safeguards): continue diagnosis/repair drafting only; do not merge or duplicate work already represented in PR #96.
* [LAF-14](https://linear.app/loganfinney/issue/LAF-14/add-github-action-to-sync-pr-state-to-linear): baseline is complete; treat as reference, not an active build lane.
* [LAF-9](https://linear.app/loganfinney/issue/LAF-9/define-vault-template-and-document-class-system) and [LAF-11](https://linear.app/loganfinney/issue/LAF-11/define-routing-rules-for-and): inspect for overlap only until sequencing is clarified.
* [LAF-12](https://linear.app/loganfinney/issue/LAF-12/break-out-the-courtroom-into-project-scoped-work-items): review for closure readiness; avoid reopening execution unless a real gap is found.

Current blockers / caution flags:

* `LINEAR_API_KEY` is still the hard blocker for PR-sync functionality.
* PR #96 is a merge-risk item until trigger-chain behavior is confirmed.
* Do not let `linear-pr-sync.yml` and `pr-linear-sync.yml` land as overlapping active paths without an explicit resolution.
* Do not start overlapping branches on [LAF-9](https://linear.app/loganfinney/issue/LAF-9/define-vault-template-and-document-class-system) or [LAF-11](https://linear.app/loganfinney/issue/LAF-11/define-routing-rules-for-and).

Swarm instruction:

* Keep this issue as the hive and coordination surface.
* Keep execution in the scoped issue lanes.
* Post one checkpoint before parking any lane: what moved, blockers, overlap/drift note, and safe-to-merge-later status.
* Escalate here only for true blocker, conflict, required human judgment, merge decision, or secret/config provisioning.

The swarm can keep buzzing safely. No hero merge...

</details>
